Market Morning Icons

Bullish-themed variants plus original minimal fintech logos. Apply with the command under each card, then reload the extension.

Tip: previews use PNGs in icons/variants/ so they work when opened locally in Chrome.

Tip: if images don't load, refresh this page — previews use PNGs from icons/variants/.

Bullish 🐂

Bull Front

python3 scripts/build-icons.py bull-front

Bull Head On

python3 scripts/build-icons.py bull-head-on

Other

01 Stripe Sunrise

python3 scripts/build-icons.py 01-stripe-sunrise

02 Gemini Orbit

python3 scripts/build-icons.py 02-gemini-orbit

03 Chart Rise

python3 scripts/build-icons.py 03-chart-rise

04 Monogram M

python3 scripts/build-icons.py 04-monogram-m

05 Rocket Coin

python3 scripts/build-icons.py 05-rocket-coin

06 Pixel Sunrise

python3 scripts/build-icons.py 06-pixel-sunrise

07 Pixel Mug

python3 scripts/build-icons.py 07-pixel-mug

09 Stripe Wave default

python3 scripts/build-icons.py 09-stripe-wave

10 Ring Chart

python3 scripts/build-icons.py 10-ring-chart

Mm Monogram

python3 scripts/build-icons.py mm-monogram

Sunrise Mark

python3 scripts/build-icons.py sunrise-mark
